Universe at a Glance

Universe = active chain-store outlets licensed for malt (VIP file). Independents not included. Selling = bought in H1 ’26, matched by VIP ID. Excluded per request: Dollar General, Aldi, CVS, Family Dollar, Menards, and the hotel/motel, military, e-commerce and unassigned channels.

Source: VIP account export, 2026-07-01. CE = case equivalents; Net Sales = distributor net price.
